data.body: Harden lease semantics for work-knot execution. On claim with an explicit external lease, require the lease to be in lease_ready; reject lease_active and any other state, and transition the accepted lease from lease_ready to lease_active as part of claim. On next, if the knot has a bound lease, require the caller to supply the matching lease_id; after a successful transition, remove the lease reference from the knot and terminate the lease. Validation of the supplied lease_id can remain lightweight, but suspicious/corrupt lease state should surface as a warning or log signal rather than being silently ignored.
data.title: Tighten lease lifecycle enforcement on claim and next
